title: 目標達成の後に・目指すは…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Haru Urara is steadily gaining
recognition and nearing the end of her classic
year...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Let's go to that Arima Kinen race
thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... A very high-profile race where
participants are selected through a fan vote.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I heard both Spe and Grass are gonna be in it!
They've been training super hard!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sei said she's going too, so I wanna go too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure watching some top-class racers will have
a positive impact on Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're here to watch the passion-filled Arima
Kinen today!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaay!
Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! There's so many people here! I can't believe
Spe and the others get to run here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder are both among
this year's most-watched Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And a bunch of older Umamusume are racing too!
It must be so cool to race alongside them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I'm so excited! I hope it starts soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The racers walk out onto the track.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, they're here! HEY, SPE!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Spe's face... It looks way different from usual.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
She looks kinda scary. But this is her big day... I
wonder what she's upset about?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nervous? Huh? Why?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But I hope she can do her best! You've got this,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the Arima Kinen begins!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The results are in folks! The winner is... Grass
Wonder! Grass Wonder has won!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week loses by a hair! The gold just barely
escaped her grasp!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I was so close! Just half a step more and...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hnngh... Urrrgh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That was an excellent race, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I planned on winning in a much more decisive
fashion. Frankly, I'm not satisfied with this result.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm not satisfied either! Next time, I'm gonna
beat you for sure!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I look forward to seeing you try. I'll see you
again next year.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You can count on it!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wowie, wow, wow! That was so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Spe and Grass were so cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: My heart is pounding! I wonder why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder put on an
amazing performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching their race has opened Haru Urara's
eyes. Maybe now, she'll finally...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it! It's because it's the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it's super fun to run in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why my heart is beating so fast! Okay, I've
decided!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna enter the Arima Kinen too!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Did I hear Haru Urara say she's gonna enter the
Arima Kinen just now?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: What? Seriously? There's no way she could get in...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Haru Urara's declaration, I can hear the
audience's confused voices getting louder and
louder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I should be happy she's decided on
a goal... but what a difficult goal it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if she's dead set on it, I have to support
her all the way!
choice_data_list: It'll be a long and hard road. Can you handle it?
It'll be a long and hard road. Can you handle it?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm no quitter!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Woo! Hahaha! See? I'm super pumped!
choice_data_list:
You have to do well in a lot of races too, you
know?

You have to do well in a lot of races too, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Haru Urara wants to enter the Arima Kinen,
she'll first have to prove that she's got what it
takes by placing high in graded races.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, you'll help me, right? I'll run a bunch, so
we'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I can't wait for next year's Arima
Kinen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm going to believe in Haru Urara's resolve.
Now that she's set her sights on a big goal, she
can move on from her classic year.
